news.t: Active-bond ETFs see record demand. Did Vanguard's fee cuts include such funds?
Bond ETF flows this year just topped annual record set in 2021

overview.description: The Vanguard Core Plus Bond ETF (VPLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund actively invests in the broad fixed income space, in seeking to provide total return and a moderate to high level of income. It holds US and foreign securities of any rating while maintaining an intermediate dollar-weighted average maturity. VPLS was launched on Nov 20, 2023 and is issued by Vanguard.

data.title: 3 Vanguard ETFs and Funds Get New Ratings
data.text: A trio of Vanguard's bond offerings recently received their first Morningstar medalist ratings.

data.text: JPMorgan Income ETF JPIE Daniel Sotiroff: ETFs have a big advantage over mutual funds: They're more tax efficient.

data.title: Active-bond ETFs see record demand. Did Vanguard's fee cuts include such funds?
data.text: Investors have upped their interest in actively managed bond ETFs, pouring record capital into them in January as some paid up in hopes of stronger returns.

data.title: Bond ETF flows this year just topped annual record set in 2021
data.text: Investors are flocking to bond ETFs this year, according to State Street.
